steps.t: The fireworks are stored at the top of the stairs overlooking the Festival Square. You should set off the fireworks to distract the wealthy patrons of…
Many wealthy patrons have been distracted by your mischief! You should pick the pockets of the wealthy patrons for coins to give to the poor.
Gareth Rust is in the workers' area in Winter-home. You should return to Gareth Rust and find out if he saw your excellent firework display.
